description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors, especially prominent on the left side, suggesting a spacious living area or sunroom. The house features a prominent garage with a double door, and multiple rectangular window arrangements that provide ample natural light. The structure includes several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. The main entryway is recessed and features a glass door, with a small overhang above it. The overall design emphasizes openness, minimalism, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a prominent garage. The design is minimalist with clean lines and a layered, geometric structure.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with a large glass-walled room and a decorative arched window, as well as the layered arrangement of the building volumes.
description_view_1: This view shows the expansive glass facade of the main living area and the rear of the house, emphasizing the open-plan design and multiple window placements.
description_view_2: This view displays the back and side of the house, revealing more window arrangements and the interplay of the different rectangular volumes.
description_view_3: This view presents the front of the house, featuring the main entryway, a double garage door, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows on the upper and lower levels.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed glass door with a small overhang, no porch or columns, minimalist and integrated into the facade
